query:
-- Items 32384, 32385, 32386 are duplicates of 530, 531, 532 respectively
-- BUT they are linked to S1131 (4G Internet) instead of the correct services
-- 32384 duplicates 530 (4G Internet $360 → S1131) - same service, true duplicate
-- 32385 duplicates 531 (Starlink $863 → S1134) - wrong service (S1131 vs S1134)
-- 32386 duplicates 532 (500mb Fibre $4450 → S1132) - wrong service (S1131 vs S1132)

-- S1131 currently has revenue from items 530 ($360) + 32384 ($360) + 32385 ($863) + 32386 ($4450) = $6,033
-- Correct revenue for S1131 should only be from item 530 ($360) - the 4G Internet item
-- Remove the 3 duplicates
DELETE FROM billing_items WHERE id IN (32384, 32385, 32386);

-- Recalculate S1131 revenue (should now only be $360 from item 530)
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
)
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1131';

-- Verify S1131 revenue
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1131';

-- Also check the ST-6817 duplicates - items 32830-32840 are extra Mobile items linked to S1125
-- Check original Mobile items for S1125
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND description = 'Mobile'
ORDER BY id;

-- BUT they are linked to S1131 (4G Internet) instead of the correct services
-- 32384 duplicates 530 (4G Internet $360 → S1131) - same service, true duplicate
-- 32385 duplicates 531 (Starlink $863 → S1134) - wrong service (S1131 vs S1134)
-- 32386 duplicates 532 (500mb Fibre $4450 → S1132) - wrong service (S1131 vs S1132)

-- S1131 currently has revenue from items 530 ($360) + 32384 ($360) + 32385 ($863) + 32386 ($4450) = $6,033
-- Correct revenue for S1131 should only be from item 530 ($360) - the 4G Internet item
-- Remove the 3 duplicates
DELETE FROM billing_items WHERE id IN (32384, 32385, 32386);

-- Recalculate S1131 revenue (should now only be $360 from item 530)
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
)
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1131';

-- Verify S1131 revenue
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1131';

-- Also check the ST-6817 duplicates - items 32830-32840 are extra Mobile items linked to S1125
-- Check original Mobile items for S1125
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND description = 'Mobile'
ORDER BY id;
